label: Ashby
description: Connect to Ashby to read and manage candidates, job postings, and hiring pipelines.

form.title: Connect Ashby
form.subtitle: Paste your Ashby API key to give Anton access to your recruiting data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from Ashby Admin → Integrations → API Keys. Simplest and fastest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate an Ashby API Key

1. Log in to your Ashby account at [app.ashbyhq.com](https://app.ashbyhq.com).
2. Click your organization name in the top-left corner, then go to **Admin**.
3. In the left sidebar, navigate to **Integrations → API Keys**.
4. Click **Create API Key**.
5. Give the key a descriptive name like `Anton` so you can identify it later.
6. Select the scopes your use case needs (e.g. **Candidates**, **Jobs**, **Applications**).
7. Click **Create** — the key is shown only once. Copy it immediately.
8. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- If you lose the key, you must generate a new one; Ashby does not show it again after creation.
- To revoke access, return to **Admin → Integrations → API Keys** and delete the key.
- API keys are scoped to your organization — make sure your account has admin rights to create them.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Ashby Admin → Integrations → API Keys. Shown only once at creation time.
